# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    skipDefaultCheckout(true)
    timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
  }

  parameters {
    text(
      name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
      defaultValue: '''https://example.com/app-1.2.3.tar.gz
s3://my-bucket/releases/app-1.2.3.tar.gz
https://artifactory.example.com/artifactory/libs-release-local/app/app-1.2.3.tar.gz''',
      description: 'One URL per line. Supported: http(s)://, s3://. Artifactory usually uses https:// URLs.'
    )
    choice(
      name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY',
      choices: ['rolling', 'all-at-once'],
      description: 'Deployment strategy'
    )
    string(
      name: 'REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR',
      defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/releases',
      description: 'Remote directory where artifacts will be uploaded'
    )
    string(
      name: 'REMOTE_CURRENT_SYMLINK',
      defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/current',
      description: 'Symlink to switch to the new release (optional). Leave empty to skip.'
    )
    string(
      name: 'REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME',
      defaultValue: 'myapp',
      description: 'Systemd service name to restart (optional). Leave empty to skip.'
    )
    string(
      name: 'REMOTE_USER',
      defaultValue: 'deploy',
      description: 'SSH username'
    )
    text(
      name: 'PROD_HOSTS',
      defaultValue: '''prod-1.example.com
prod-2.example.com''',
      description: 'One host per line'
    )
    choice(
      name: 'SSH_PORT',
      choices: ['22', '2222'],
      description: 'SSH port'
    )
    booleanParam(
      name: 'VERIFY_TLS',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Verify TLS for https downloads'
    )
    booleanParam(
      name: 'DRY_RUN',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'If true, do not upload/deploy; only download and validate.'
    )
    booleanParam(
      name: 'FAIL_IF_EXISTS',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'If true, fail if a release directory already exists on target.'
    )
    credentials(
      name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'SSH private key credentials for production servers'
    )
    credentials(
      name: 'HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Optional: username/password for http(s) basic auth (Artifactory, etc.)'
    )
    credentials(
      name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Optional: AWS credentials for s3:// downloads'
    )
  }

  environment {
    WORK_DL_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/downloaded_artifacts"
    WORK_PKG_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/package"
    RELEASE_ID = "${env.JOB_NAME}".replaceAll(/[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+/, '_') + "-" + "${env.BUILD_NUMBER}" + "-" + new Date().format("yyyyMMddHHmmss", TimeZone.getTimeZone('UTC'))
  }

  stages {
    stage('Validate Inputs') {
      steps {
        script {
          def urls = (params.ARTIFACT_URLS ?: '')
            .split(/\r?\n/)
            .collect { it.trim() }
            .findAll { it && !it.startsWith('#') }

          def hosts = (params.PROD_HOSTS ?: '')
            .split(/\r?\n/)
            .collect { it.trim() }
            .findAll { it && !it.startsWith('#') }

          if (urls.isEmpty()) error("ARTIFACT_URLS is empty. Provide at least one URL.")
          if (hosts.isEmpty()) error("PROD_HOSTS is empty. Provide at least one host.")

          def bad = urls.findAll { !(it ==~ /^(https?:\/\/|s3:\/\/).+/) }
          if (!bad.isEmpty()) error("Unsupported URL(s):\n- " + bad.join("\n- ") + "\nSupported: http(s)://, s3://")

          if (!params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) error("SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID is required.")

          currentBuild.description = "Release: ${env.RELEASE_ID}\nArtifacts: ${urls.size()}\nHosts: ${hosts.size()}\nStrategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}"

          env._URLS = urls.join('\n')
          env._HOSTS = hosts.join('\n')
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare Workspace') {
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf "${WORK_DL_DIR}" "${WORK_PKG_DIR}"
          mkdir -p "${WORK_DL_DIR}" "${WORK_PKG_DIR}"
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Download Artifacts') {
      steps {
        script {
          def urls = env._URLS.split(/\n/).toList()

          def httpCredId = (params.HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID ?: '').trim()
          def awsCredId = (params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID ?: '').trim()

          def tlsFlag = params.VERIFY_TLS ? "" : "--insecure"

          def downloadHttp = { String url ->
            def name = url.tokenize('/').last()
            if (!name) name = "artifact-" + UUID.randomUUID().toString()
            def out = "${env.WORK_DL_DIR}/${name}"

            if (httpCredId) {
              withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: httpCredId, usernameVariable: 'HTTP_USER', passwordVariable: 'HTTP_PASS')]) {
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  curl -fL ${tlsFlag} --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 1800 \\
                    -u "\$HTTP_USER:\$HTTP_PASS" \\
                    -o "${out}" "${url}"
                """
              }
            } else {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                curl -fL ${tlsFlag} --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 1800 \\
                  -o "${out}" "${url}"
              """
            }
            return out
          }

          def downloadS3 = { String url ->
            if (!awsCredId) {
              error("Encountered s3:// URL but AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID is not set: ${url}")
            }
            def key = url.replaceFirst(/^s3:\/\//, '')
            def name = key.tokenize('/').last()
            if (!name) name = "artifact-" + UUID.randomUUID().toString()
            def out = "${env.WORK_DL_DIR}/${name}"

            withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', credentialsId: awsCredId]]) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                aws s3 cp "${url}" "${out}"
              """
            }
            return out
          }

          def downloaded = []
          urls.each { u ->
            if (u.startsWith('http://') || u.startsWith('https://')) {
              downloaded << downloadHttp(u)
            } else if (u.startsWith('s3://')) {
              downloaded << downloadS3(u)
            } else {
              error("Unsupported URL: ${u}")
            }
          }

          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            ls -lah "${WORK_DL_DIR}"
          """

          env._DOWNLOADED = downloaded.join('\n')
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Build Release Bundle') {
      steps {
        script {
          def files = env._DOWNLOADED.split(/\n/).toList()
          def manifest = "${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/manifest.txt"
          def checksums = "${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/sha256sums.txt"
          def bundle = "${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/release-${env.RELEASE_ID}.tgz"

          writeFile file: manifest, text: files.collect { f -> new File(f).getName() }.join('\n') + "\n"

          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            cd "${WORK_DL_DIR}"
            sha256sum * > "${checksums}"
            cp "${checksums}" "${WORK_PKG_DIR}/"
            tar -czf "${bundle}" -C "${WORK_DL_DIR}" .
            ls -lah "${WORK_PKG_DIR}"
          """

          env.RELEASE_BUNDLE = bundle
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      when { expression { return !params.DRY_RUN } }
      steps {
        script {
          def hosts = env._HOSTS.split(/\n/).toList()
          def sshPort = params.SSH_PORT as String
          def remoteUser = params.REMOTE_USER.trim()
          def remoteDir = params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR.trim()
          def releaseId = env.RELEASE_ID
          def remoteReleaseDir = "${remoteDir}/${releaseId}"
          def remoteSymlink = (params.REMOTE_CURRENT_SYMLINK ?: '').trim()
          def serviceName = (params.REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME ?: '').trim()
          def failIfExists = params.FAIL_IF_EXISTS

          def deployToHost = { String host ->
            sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                SSH_OPTS="-p ${sshPort} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o BatchMode=yes"
                TARGET="${remoteUser}@${host}"

                ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "sudo -n true >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; mkdir -p '${remoteDir}'"

                if ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "test -e '${remoteReleaseDir}'"; then
                  if [ "${failIfExists}" = "true" ]; then
                    echo "Remote release dir already exists: ${remoteReleaseDir}"
                    exit 2
                  else
                    echo "Remote release dir exists; will reuse: ${remoteReleaseDir}"
                  fi
                else
                  ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "mkdir -p '${remoteReleaseDir}'"
                fi

                scp \$SSH_OPTS "${RELEASE_BUNDLE}" "\$TARGET:${remoteReleaseDir}/release.tgz"
                ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "cd '${remoteReleaseDir}' && tar -xzf release.tgz && rm -f release.tgz"

                if [ -f "${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/sha256sums.txt" ]; then
                  scp \$SSH_OPTS "${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/sha256sums.txt" "\$TARGET:${remoteReleaseDir}/sha256sums.txt"
                  ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "cd '${remoteReleaseDir}' && sha256sum -c sha256sums.txt"
                fi

                if [ -n "${remoteSymlink}" ]; then
                  ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "ln -sfn '${remoteReleaseDir}' '${remoteSymlink}'"
                fi

                if [ -n "${serviceName}" ]; then
                  ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo -n systemctl restart '${serviceName}' || systemctl restart '${serviceName}'; else echo 'systemctl not found; skipping restart'; fi"
                fi
              """
            }
          }

          if (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY == 'all-at-once') {
            def branches = [:]
            hosts.each { h ->
              def host = h
              branches["deploy-${host}"] = { deployToHost(host) }
            }
            parallel branches
          } else {
            hosts.each { h ->
              deployToHost(h)
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Post-Deploy Smoke (optional)') {
      when { expression { return !params.DRY_RUN } }
      steps {
        script {
          def hosts = env._HOSTS.split(/\n/).toList()
          def sshPort = params.SSH_PORT as String
          def remoteUser = params.REMOTE_USER.trim()
          def remoteSymlink = (params.REMOTE_CURRENT_SYMLINK ?: '').trim()
          sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
            hosts.each { host ->
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                SSH_OPTS="-p ${sshPort} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o BatchMode=yes"
                TARGET="${remoteUser}@${host}"
                if [ -n "${remoteSymlink}" ]; then
                  ssh \$SSH_OPTS "\$TARGET" "test -e '${remoteSymlink}' && readlink -f '${remoteSymlink}' || true"
                else
                  echo "No REMOTE_CURRENT_SYMLINK set; skipping smoke check on ${host}"
                fi
              """
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'package/*, downloaded_artifacts/*', onlyIfSuccessful: false, fingerprint: true
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, notFailBuild: true)
    }
  }
}
